name: Competitive Gap Detection
trigger: Ookla benchmarking shows operator median 5G throughput 30% below market leader in three consecutive months in top-5 revenue cities.

autonomyLevels.L1: Network planning team reviews gap report. CapEx re-prioritisation in next planning cycle.
autonomyLevels.L2: Automated parameter optimisation in affected geographies. Results tracked against competitor benchmark.
autonomyLevels.L3: Cross-domain optimisation triggered. Spectrum refarming initiated in identified gap zones.
autonomyLevels.L4: Autonomous network continuously monitors competitive position and adjusts resource allocation to maintain parity in prioritised geographies.

economicOutcome: Competitive parity restored in high-revenue geographies before NPS gap widens into churn acceleration.
economicCalculation: A 10-point NPS gap to market leader in a city of 500K subscribers correlates with 2–4% elevated churn. At €28 ARPU: 10,000 subscribers × €28 × 12 = €3.36M annual revenue at risk.
combinationUpgrade: Drive test (Keysight Nemo) validates Ookla crowdsource data with controlled measurements, confirming competitive gap before CapEx commitment.
